content: SuperCollider 3.14.1 cross-platform availability (supercollider.github.io/downloads verified 2026-06-26): macOS universal binary (signed & notarized) for macOS 11+ plus an x64 legacy build for 10.15+; Windows x64 installer (Win10/11) — no arm64 Windows build. Linux has NO official prebuilt binary: only a source tarball (gcc>=9) plus distro packages (Arch/Debian/Ubuntu/Fedora/openSUSE). Implication for cross-platform bundling: SC can be bundled as a sidecar on macOS+Windows (extract scsynth/sclang from the official installers), but Linux must build SC from source or require a system install. There is no official Windows arm64 SC. Plan per-OS SC sourcing in CI.
